mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_queries ( job_id, query_text, query_type, source_target ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{queryText}, #{queryType}, #{sourceTarget} )

INSERT INTO search_results ( job_id, query_id, source, title, url, image_url, snippet, price, mall_name, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{queryId}, #{source}, #{title}, #{url}, #{imageUrl}, #{snippet}, #{price}, #{mallName}, #{rawJson} )

INSERT INTO product_candidates ( job_id, result_id, product_name, brand, category, image_url, product_url, price, visual_score, text_score, final_score, reason ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{resultId}, #{productName}, #{brand}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{productUrl}, #{price}, #{visualScore}, #{textScore}, #{finalScore}, #{reason} )
